title: Mutex-based state could bottleneck under concurrency
evidence: src/lib.rs:11 — AppState = Arc<Mutex<rusqlite::Connection>>; every request acquires the mutex sequentially
suggestion: Consider r2d2 connection pool or tokio::sync::Mutex for better concurrent throughput

title: Route uses deprecated :id path syntax
evidence: src/lib.rs:17 — .route("/books/:id", ...) uses axum 0.6-style colon syntax; axum 0.7 prefers /books/{id}
suggestion: Use /books/{id} path syntax for axum 0.7 compatibility

title: No pagination on GET /books
evidence: src/handlers.rs:47 list_books returns all books with no limit/offset support
suggestion: Add ?limit and ?offset query params for large collections

title: No ISBN uniqueness constraint
evidence: src/db.rs:6 — CREATE TABLE has no UNIQUE constraint on isbn column
suggestion: Add UNIQUE constraint on isbn if duplicates should be prevented
